text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm in my office one day when Director Akikawa
pays me a visit.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: 's magnificent performance has been the definition of fierce! And valiant!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Well done indeed! Your incredible efforts are the
pride of Tracen Academy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I receive plenty of direct and heartfelt praise! It
sounds like we've achieved a fantastic result!
